sources.notes: PAYWALLED — no PMC full text available (PMC field is null). Abstract states 'unique non-synonymous de novo mutations in nine genes' with six 'likely to be pathogenic'. Abstract does not name any genes explicitly. The 6 known pathogenic genes come from follow-up literature and reviews. The remaining 3 genes (of 9 total) are unknown without full text — presumably the 3 variants of uncertain significance. PubMed eLink gene query returned RAB39B (gene ID 116442) and DEAF1 (ID 10522); DEAF1 not in the known 6 but could be one of the uncertain-significance genes — excluded from comprehensive list without full text confirmation. Comprehensive list set equal to expected_genes (the 6 known pathogenic genes) due to paywall limitation.
